description: NaviPlan Central is InvestCloud financial planning software used by advisors to manage client fact-finding and financial plans. The naviplancentral.com site serves the NaviPlan application and related APIs.
summary: naviplancentral.com exposes two documented HTTP APIs: the NaviPlan Fact Finder API and the NaviPlan Plan API; public docs/spec origins indicate both, but authentication details could not be verified from accessible documentation.
